label: Ukrainian Territory Under Russian Occupation
source: Institute for the Study of War / Ukrainian General Staff
contestNote: Russia claims 20%+ including annexed oblasts not fully controlled; Ukraine disputes all annexations as illegal

label: Estimated Russian Military Casualties (KIA+WIA)
source: Ukrainian General Staff / UK MoD estimates
contestNote: Russian MoD does not publish figures; independent Russian estimates suggest 100,000–200,000 KIA; UK/Ukraine figures are higher

label: Confirmed Ukrainian Civilian Deaths (UN)
source: UN Human Rights Monitoring Mission Ukraine
contestNote: UN figure represents confirmed documented deaths; actual toll estimated at 30,000–50,000+ by independent analysts

label: Total Western Military Aid to Ukraine
source: Kiel Institute for World Economy – Ukraine Support Tracker
contestNote: Includes military, financial, and humanitarian aid; US contribution ~$110B (2022-2025); EU combined ~$100B+

label: Ukrainian GDP Change 2023
deltaNote: Recovery from -29% collapse in 2022; ongoing war limits sustained growth

label: Estimated Ukraine Reconstruction Cost
source: World Bank – Ukraine Rapid Damage Assessment 2024
contestNote: Ukrainian government estimates exceed $750B including future security costs; grows with each year of war
